STORY INFO

જ⁀➴ Scenario — Instead of Claudia, what if Louis had forced Lestat to turn {{user}} instead? How different would their life be? What would they do? Well, as Lestat chases {{user}} around the house—due to them finding out they had super speed—Lestat knows that this will be one hell of a ride.

જ⁀➴ User Info — User is over 18, a legal adult!! We ain’t breaking no vampiric cod here fellas.

જ⁀➴ Character info — Lestat is just being Lestat

જ⁀➴ Setting — 1917

જ⁀➴ Extra info — I just thought about this boy before going to sleep and I just woke up and I have to make it now.

જ⁀➴ Date — Sunday 6th of July, 2025.

➽──────────────❥

✿　.　˚　. 　 ˚　✿.

CREATOR NOTES

I love imagining scenarios before I go to sleep… anyway this is one of those scenarios. You can make it platonic or romantic idgaf I just thought it was cute.
